info.title: Stanislavus OKR Application API
info.description: REST API for managing Objectives and Key Results (OKRs). Supports hierarchical objectives with position-based ordering, key results with metric tracking, team/manager assignment, and user management with role-based access control.

get.description: Returns all registered users. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user. Cannot delete yourself. Admin only.

put.description: Change the authenticated user's password. Requires current password verification.

post.description: Creates a new team. Requires edit or admin role.

put.description: Renames a team. Requires edit or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a team. Requires edit or admin role.

post.description: Creates a new manager. Requires edit or admin role.

put.description: Renames a manager. Requires edit or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a manager. Requires edit or admin role.

get.description: Returns the full objective hierarchy tree with nested children and key results. Can be filtered by team or manager.
Returns all objectives as a flat (non-hierarchical) list.

post.description: Creates a new objective. Requires edit or admin role.

put.description: Batch-update positions for sibling objectives. Requires edit or admin role.
Updates one or more fields of an objective. Requires edit or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an objective and all its children and key results. Requires edit or admin role.

post.description: Creates a new key result under an objective. Requires edit or admin role.

put.description: Batch-update positions for key results within an objective. Requires edit or admin role.
Updates one or more fields of a key result. Requires edit or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a key result. Requires edit or admin role.

post.description: Creates a new initiative under an objective. Requires edit or admin role.

put.description: Batch-update positions for initiatives within an objective. Requires edit or admin role.

get.description: Returns all application settings. Admin only.

put.description: Updates one or more application settings. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all OKR cycles ordered by date. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new OKR cycle with auto-calculated dates. Admin only.

put.description: Updates name, dates, or cycle length of an OKR cycle. Admin only.
Changes the status of an OKR cycle (draft, in_progress, completed). Admin only.
Updates one or more fields of an initiative. Requires edit or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an initiative. Requires edit or admin role.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Generate a token via the user profile/update API or from the application settings.

sessionCookie.name: session
sessionCookie.description: Flask-Login session cookie. Set after login via POST /login.

removedIds.description: IDs of all recursively deleted objectives

cycleId.description: Parent cycle ID for OKR cycle scoping
Parent cycle ID for OKR cycle scoping
Parent cycle ID for OKR cycle scoping

keyResults.description: Key results belonging to this objective

currentValue.description: Current measured value. Changing this refreshes lastUpdated and source.

source.description: Source of the last metric update

docLink.description: Link to metric source or documentation

description.description: Internal notes about metric calculation logic

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last currentValue change

confidence.description: Confidence score for the key result

regenerateToken.description: Set to true to issue a new API token (old one stops working)

docLink.description: Link to metric source or documentation

description.description: Internal notes about metric calculation logic

confidence.description: Confidence score for the key result

currentValue.description: Current measured value. Changing this refreshes lastUpdated and source.

docLink.description: Link to metric source or documentation

description.description: Internal notes about metric calculation logic

confidence.description: Confidence score for the key result

impact.description: How will this impact the objective?
How will this impact the objective?
How will this impact the objective?

items.description: List of items with new positions

BadRequest.description: Bad request — missing or invalid fields

Unauthorized.description: Not authenticated — missing or invalid session/token
